Project Rules:
- Immer TypeScript + Tailwind v4
- Alle externen API Keys NUR über Netlify Functions
- Style: Cyberpunk 2077 meets Apple Vision Pro – neon purple/cyan, heavy glassmorphism, micro-animations, Three.js particles
- Jede neue Feature muss AI-ready sein (OpenAI/Grok API ready hooks)
- Performance first: Server Components wo möglich, TanStack Query für Client Data
